query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT dataReferencia) as datas, COUNT(DISTINCT rating) as ratings, COUNT(DISTINCT indexador) as indexadores, SUM(isOutlier) as outliers FROM spread_analysis; SELECT dataReferencia, COUNT(*) as ativos FROM spread_analysis GROUP BY dataReferencia ORDER BY dataReferencia DESC;
